title: createRuntime
description: Wraps a root component so that mounting it boots a child runtime with its own ledger, its own lock, and its own failure domain.
signature:
createRuntime

(Root: (props: P) => CReactNode): (props: P & { memory?: Memory }) => CReactNode
param_root_desc: Required. The child universe's root component. Its props are the entire boundary contract.
returns_desc: A component accepting Root's props plus an optional memory. A key is required, as for any resource component — the wrapper node's path+key address becomes the child's stack name and ledger name.
outputs_intro: All other RenderOptions (user, enableAuditLog, lockTtlSeconds, maxHandlerExecutions) inherit from the parent runtime. The wrapper node's outputs are runtime-provided only:
output_ready_desc: True once the child's initial deployment completed.
output_error_desc: Set when the child failed — deployment errors and lock-acquisition failures surface here as data; they never throw through the parent's executor.
callout_detach: Unmounting the wrapper (or disposing the parent) detaches the child: its ledger persists, and re-mounting re-hydrates and re-converges. Parent context does not cross the boundary; props cross verbatim, exactly as at any component boundary. See Runtime Boundaries for the full sovereignty model.
